title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of India! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of India:
Bank of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India!
